# chalk_environment_gateway_binding (Resource)

Manages a binding between a Chalk environment and a gateway.

**Required permissions:** `project.create`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_gateway_id` (String) The ID of the cluster gateway to bind to the environment.
- `environment_id` (String) The ID of the environment to bind to the gateway.
